title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code provides an 8-minute explanation of agent harness engineering, positioning it as a growing topic that evolved from prompt engineering and context engineering. The video covers harness engineering fundamentals, architectural patterns, and the role of loops in agentic systems.
